info.title: Cosmos Pay — Payments API
info.description: Payments microservice (Stellar payment intents). All endpoints require traffic to arrive through the APISIX gateway: a valid `X-Gateway-Secret` header plus an authenticated consumer (`X-Consumer-Username`). Paths already include the version (`/v1/...`).

source.description: Payer's Stellar account — the transaction source.

amount.description: Amount as a decimal string (max 7 decimals).

assetCode.description: Asset code. Omit (or "XLM"/"native") for native lumens.

assetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native asset.

memo.description: MEMO_ID (numeric uint64) for idempotency + on-chain identification. Auto-generated when omitted.

msg.description: SEP-7 `msg`: shown to the user in their wallet (≤ 300 chars).

callback.description: SEP-7 `callback` where the wallet POSTs the signed XDR, e.g. `url:https://...`.

amount.description: Amount the destination should receive. Omit to let the user enter it (e.g. donations).

assetCode.description: Asset code the destination receives. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

assetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native asset.

memo.description: MEMO_ID (numeric uint64) for idempotency + on-chain identification. Auto-generated when omitted.

msg.description: SEP-7 `msg`: shown to the user in their wallet (≤ 300 chars).

xdr.description: Unsigned transaction envelope (null for PAY intents).

uri.description: SEP-7 deep link (`tx` for TX intents, `pay` for PAY intents).

qr.description: QR code of the SEP-7 URI (PNG data URL), derived on read.

txHash.description: Hash of the submitted Stellar transaction to validate against this intent.

reason.description: Why validation failed, when `valid` is false.

txHash.description: Stellar transaction hash once the signed tx is submitted.

sourceAssetCode.description: Source asset code (the asset being sold). Native if omitted.

sourceAssetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native source asset.

amount.description: Gross amount of the source asset to swap (decimal, ≤ 7 places). The platform fee is deducted from this and the remainder is routed.

destAssetCode.description: Destination asset code (the asset being bought).

destAssetIssuer.description: Issuer account for the destination asset (required unless it is native).

slippageBps.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points (50 = 0.5%) used to derive the on-chain minimum received. Defaults to the service setting; capped by it.

wallet.description: Fee collector account (null when the fee is disabled).

estimated.description: Quoted amount received for the routed (post-fee) input.

minimum.description: On-chain minimum (destMin) after slippage — swap reverts below it.

issuer.description: Issuer for a non-native hop (null for native).

sourceAssetCode.description: Source asset code (the asset being sold). Native if omitted.

sourceAssetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native source asset.

amount.description: Gross amount of the source asset to swap (decimal, ≤ 7 places). The platform fee is deducted from this and the remainder is routed.

destAssetCode.description: Destination asset code (the asset being bought).

destAssetIssuer.description: Issuer account for the destination asset (required unless it is native).

slippageBps.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points (50 = 0.5%) used to derive the on-chain minimum received. Defaults to the service setting; capped by it.

source.description: Account paying for (and signing) the swap — the tx source.

destination.description: Account credited the destination asset. Defaults to `source` (a self-swap). Must already trust a non-native destination asset.

memo.description: Optional MEMO_ID (numeric uint64) echoed on-chain for reconciliation.

xdr.description: Unsigned transaction envelope (base64 XDR) to sign.

txHash.description: The on-chain transaction hash once submitted.

reason.description: Why submission failed, when `submitted` is false.

resultCodes.description: Horizon transaction/operation result codes on a rejection.

url.description: HTTPS URL that will receive POSTed event notifications.

eventTypes.description: Event types to subscribe to. Omit/empty to receive all events.

secret.description: HMAC signing secret — shown once. Store it securely.

amount.description: Decimal price (≤ 7 decimals). Omit for a customer-set amount.

assetCode.description: Asset code the price is in. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

amount.description: Decimal price (≤ 7 decimals). Omit for a customer-set amount.

assetCode.description: Asset code the price is in. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

account.description: Optional Stellar account to associate the customer with.
Optional Stellar account to associate the customer with.

external_id.description: Your own id for this receiver

tos_id.description: Accepted terms-of-service id (from the redirect of POST /v1/kyc/terms-of-service). Required by BlindPay to create a receiver.

external_id.description: Your own id for this receiver

tos_id.description: Accepted terms-of-service id (from the redirect of POST /v1/kyc/terms-of-service). Required by BlindPay to create a receiver.

signature_tx_hash.description: Signed sign-message tx hash (secure EOA flow).

business_industry.description: NAICS code; required for business-class US/SWIFT accounts.

receiver_id.description: Existing receiver to (re)accept updated terms for.

idempotency_key.description: UUID for idempotency. Auto-generated when omitted.

blockchain_wallet_id.description: Cosmos Pay wallet id (from POST /v1/kyc/receivers/:id/wallets) that receives the minted stablecoin.

payment_method.description: Fiat-in method. Note: payins use `spei`/`transfers`/`pse` (not the `_bitso` payout rails).

cover_fees.description: When true, the sender absorbs the fees.

payer_rules.description: Required for Transfers (AR) and PSE (CO) payins.

address.description: Stellar address that needs the asset trustline.

blockchain_wallet_id.description: Cosmos Pay wallet id that receives the converted stablecoin.

bank_account_id.description: Cosmos Pay bank account id (from POST /v1/kyc/receivers/:id/bank-accounts) that receives the fiat.

cover_fees.description: When true, the sender absorbs fees.

contract.description: EVM approve payload to sign (abi, address, functionName, amount, network).

signed_transaction.description: Signed transaction (Stellar XDR / Solana tx) from the authorize step.
